categoryNote: Hero eyebrow is a back-link '← Integrations' to /{lang}#features; label is English on BOTH locales.
title: Platform Integrations
description: Getir, Trendyol, Yemeksepeti, Qapera and more — map your catalog once and every platform stays in sync. Bulk pricing, review inbox, claims handling and live status control, all from one panel.
stepsNote: No numbered 01-06 steps section on this page.

capabilitiesHeading.h2_tr: Platform Integrations ile gelen her şey, uçtan uca.
capabilitiesHeading.h2_en: Everything Platform Integrations ships with, end to end.

capabilities.title: Catalog mapping, once
capabilities.body: Map products, categories and modifiers to platform equivalents once. Everything stays in sync going forward.

capabilities.title: Bulk platform pricing
capabilities.body: Update prices across Getir, Trendyol and Yemeksepeti in a single sheet view. Per-platform markups supported.

capabilities.title: Reviews & claims inbox
capabilities.body: Reply to platform reviews from one inbox. Approve, reject or escalate Trendyol claims directly from Dasvio.

capabilities.title: Live status control
capabilities.body: Toggle restaurant busyness, courier status or open/close on every platform from a single button.

quote.variantNote: This page uses the QUOTE section (figure/blockquote with tinted quote-glyph icon), NOT the 'why' section (pos/qr-menu have 'Ekibinizin zaten kullandığı panele entegre.' instead).
textParts: We finally have a single panel for everything
touches. Our team onboards in a morning, not a week.
quote.textPartsNote: All three parts are plain text nodes inside <blockquote>, separated only by JSX comment markers (<!-- -->); the middle (product-name) part is NOT wrapped in any span.

otherProductsNote: Card tints in order: #ffffff (QR Menü), #06b6d4 (Dasvio POS), #f43f5e (Çoklu Şube Yönetimi). Card titles/descriptions are TURKISH on BOTH locales; only the 'Keşfet'/'Explore' label and hrefs are localized.

trTitle_vs_enTitle.IMPORTANT_languageAnomaly: All product-specific copy (h1 'Platform Integrations', hero description, capability titles/bodies, quote text and attribution, hero eyebrow 'Integrations') is ENGLISH on the TR page as well — TR and EN are byte-identical for these strings. This deviates from the expectation that shared content is Turkish (pos/qr-menu TR pages are Turkish; analytics/heatmaps share this English anomaly). Review-bubble mock texts ('Hızlı teslimat', 'Lezzetli yemek', 'Mükemmel hizmet') are Turkish on both locales.

capabilitiesH2: Platform Integrations ile gelen her şey, uçtan uca.
Everything Platform Integrations ships with, end to end.
exploreH2: The rest of the Dasvio platform.

trTitle_vs_enTitle.deployVsOldSourceDiff: Deployed PricingSheet visual table header is 'Product / Base / TY / GT' (English); old source FeatureSubVisuals.PricingSheet had 'Ürün / Taban'. Deploy is authoritative.
